title: Stop Learning Python Wrong (Setup Matters First)
description: Most tutorials teach syntax before thinking. That's backwards. Setup your environment first—then everything clicks. Tutorial 1/10. #Shorts #Python #DataScience #Coding #Learning
hook_visual: Large on-screen text: 'You're learning Python wrong.' Cut to confused developer staring at error. Then cut to clean terminal showing 'source env/bin/activate' with checkmarks appearing.
end_screen_cta: Watch the full 20-minute tutorial to build your foundation correctly. Link in bio.
